none.justification: Mostly correct on the leak verdict and it does discuss the important ownership-transfer cases, including the 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys fields. However it states the wrong total count (18 direct os_malloc sites / 20 including os_zalloc) and drags in out-of-scope os_zalloc calls, so it is not fully correct against the GT’s 26-call-site scope.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT: 26 os_malloc call sites across 8 files, no leaks, and correctly treats the return-value transfers and the 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys struct-field transfers as non-leaks with failure cleanup via ikev2_free_keys().

lsp.justification: Matches the GT’s substance despite noting the LSP indexing gap: it identifies all 26 os_malloc sites, gives the same no-leak verdict, and correctly handles all three return ownership transfers plus the 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys field transfers.
